user_claim: Agent: Hi, can you describe the damage? User: My front bumper got hit. There's a big dent on the driver's side. Agent: Can you share photos? User: Yes, attaching two photos.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Two focused images of the front bumper area are provided.
claim_status_justification: img_1 and img_2 both show a prominent dent on the driver-side front bumper consistent with the user's description of a parking-lot impact.

user_claim: Agent: What happened? User: I dropped my laptop and the screen cracked. The bottom half is black now. Agent: OK, please submit photos. User: Here is the photo.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Single image provided showing the laptop screen with visible crack and blackout.
claim_status_justification: img_1 clearly shows a crack across the lower portion of the laptop screen with corresponding display blackout consistent with the drop claim.

user_claim: Agent: Tell me about your package. User: It arrived completely crushed. The box was smashed and the ceramic vase inside is broken. Agent: Did you take photos before opening? User: Yes, I have photos of the box and the broken item.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Three images provided covering exterior damage and broken contents.
claim_status_justification: img_1 shows the crushed exterior box; img_2 shows the deformed corner; img_3 shows the broken ceramic item inside. All consistent with the claim.

user_claim: Agent: What is your claim about? User: My car's rear windshield shattered. I think someone threw a rock overnight. Agent: Did you file a police report? User: Not yet.
evidence_standard_met_reason: One image of the rear windshield showing shatter pattern.
claim_status_justification: img_1 shows a shattered rear windshield with a radial crack pattern consistent with an impact point. No signs of manipulation.

user_claim: Agent: What happened to your laptop? User: The hinge is completely broken. The screen barely stays up. Agent: Did you drop it? User: No, it just stopped working when I opened it.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Single image showing the laptop hinge area.
claim_status_justification: img_1 shows the hinge mechanism is visibly fractured; the screen is at an abnormal angle consistent with structural failure of the hinge.
